name: Ramona 12x16 Gambrel Shed Plan - A Barn-Style Storage & Workspace Design
open_features: Iconic barn-style gambrel roof provides increased headroom and usable wall height-ideal for tall storage, shelving, or future loft options.
Straightforward framing, efficient roof geometry, and easy-to-follow plans make this shed suitable for both beginners and experienced builders.
Classic barn-style double doors allow easy movement of lawn equipment, tools, bikes, workbenches, and bulky storage items.
Warm horizontal lap siding, clean white trim, and a traditional roofline create a rustic yet refined backyard structure.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Ramona Gambrel Shed Plan - a 12x16 barn-style shed designed to maximize interior space while delivering timeless curb appeal. Featuring a classic gambrel roof, clean horizontal siding, and wide barn-style double doors, Ramona combines traditional charm with modern functionality. Whether you're building a spacious storage shed, backyard workshop, garden supply hub, or creative hobby space, the Ramona 12x16 offers smart space planning, DIY-friendly...
